note: exp25-4p (v41): combined-IL warm-start -> 4p FFA self-play LEAGUE on the v41 arch. MODEL = v41 (exp20 v41 4p port): OrbitNet19 trunk E=128/6L/4 heads returning a GLOBAL token gemb; frac head = SimpleFracMLP (2-layer MLP on concat[emb[source] || emb[chosen-target] || gemb] = 3*128=384 -> 256 -> 2 giving mu,sigma; NO edge, NO coord-attn); pointer query from local emb (self-slot = HOLD legal); 2-tree {net,frac}. FEATURES = v37/v41 econ-CNN, RING-ROLE relative via C4 seat-canonical rotation (q1=clockwise, q2=antipodal, q3=ccw): static 30, ts (50,10), glob 34, econ_curves (50,8). DEPLOY = NATIVE 4p (me = real seat 0..3, NO 2p->4p owner remap). SELF-PLAY (train_league_4p.py): anchor seat0 always current + seats 1,2,3 each independently 80% current / 20% league; 3 independent PFSP-sampled pool members/update; record all current-controlled seats (league seats masked); FFA per-seat reward sign(ships_i-max_others); NO RESIGN; PER-PLAYER 128 in-flight FLEET CAP (TRAIN-ONLY; MAX_FLEETS=4*128=512). Two-winrate league pool: per-member 1st-place EMA (PFSP P~wr^1+floor) + reference current-out-ranks-member EMA (admission >=0.70). c1st metric = current 1st-place over ALL current seats.
arch_note: E=128, 6-layer edge-bias econ-CNN trunk, 4 heads. trunk returns gemb (global token). pointer query from emb, self=hold. frac = SimpleFracMLP([emb||emb_tid||gemb] 384->256->2) -> CONTINUOUS clipped-Gaussian fraction (mu,sigma; sigma=exp(clip(o,-2.0,0.0)) in [~0.135, 1.0]). NUMPY DEPLOY PORT rl_infer.py = the v41 port (decode == jax greedy; decode_parity.py on the NATIVE 4p board pool, seats 0..3). agent.py reads ORBIT4P_WEIGHTS (default weights.npz).
version_label: exp25-4p v1 (v41): combined 2p+4p IL warm-start + 4p FFA self-play league (v41 OrbitNet19 + SimpleFracMLP, E128/6L/4h, per-player 128 fleet cap, sigma<=1.0).
